operation.name: InsertOrUpdate
operation.sql: INSERT INTO user_message_views (user_id, peer_type, peer_id, peer_seq, canonical_message_id, from_user_id, outgoing, message_kind, message_status, edit_version, date, view_schema_version, view_payload) VALUES (:user_id, :peer_type, :peer_id, :peer_seq, :canonical_message_id, :from_user_id, :outgoing, :message_kind, :message_status, :edit_version, :date, :view_schema_version, :view_payload) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE message_status = VALUES(message_status), edit_version = VALUES(edit_version), view_schema_version = VALUES(view_schema_version), view_payload = VALUES(view_payload)

operation.name: SelectByUserCanonical
operation.sql: SELECT user_id, peer_type, peer_id, peer_seq, canonical_message_id, from_user_id, outgoing, message_kind, message_status, edit_version, date, view_schema_version, view_payload FROM user_message_views WHERE user_id = :user_id AND canonical_message_id = :canonical_message_id LIMIT 1

operation.name: SelectByUserPeerSeq
operation.sql: SELECT user_id, peer_type, peer_id, peer_seq, canonical_message_id, from_user_id, outgoing, message_kind, message_status, edit_version, date, view_schema_version, view_payload FROM user_message_views WHERE user_id = :user_id AND peer_type = :peer_type AND peer_id = :peer_id AND peer_seq = :peer_seq LIMIT 1

operation.name: SelectPeerSeqRange
operation.sql: SELECT user_id, peer_type, peer_id, peer_seq, canonical_message_id, from_user_id, outgoing, message_kind, message_status, edit_version, date, view_schema_version, view_payload FROM user_message_views WHERE user_id = :user_id AND peer_type = :peer_type AND peer_id = :peer_id AND peer_seq > :peer_seq AND peer_seq <= :maxPeerSeq ORDER BY peer_seq LIMIT :limit
